title: NIA – Crime Scene Assistant, Explosive Expert and More – 30 Posts
applyMode: Hard copy through proper channel - submit to SP (Admin), NIA HQ, Opposite CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi-110003; Advance copy by email to [email protected]
shortInfo: The National Investigation Agency (NIA) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 30 Crime Scene Assistant, Explosive Expert and More. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 13-04-2026, and closes on 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through NIA website, nia.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: NIA Scientific Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 30 Crime Scene Assistant, Explosive Expert and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The National Investigation Agency (NIA) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 30 Crime Scene Assistant, Explosive Expert and More. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 13-04-2026, and closes on 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through NIA website, nia.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: National Investigation Agency (NIA), Ministry of Home Affairs, Govt. of India
basic_details.application_mode: Hard copy through proper channel - submit to SP (Admin), NIA HQ, Opposite CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi-110003; Advance copy by email to [email protected]

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Within 60 days from the date of publication of this item in 'Employment News' (13/06/2026)

age_limit.age_details: Selection by NIA Selection Committee - appointment on deputation (ISTC) basis

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted in hard copy through proper channel to: The SP (Admin), NIA HQ, Opposite CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi-110003 within 60 days from the date of publication in Employment News. Nominations must be forwarded by the concerned Ministry/Department/Organisation along with all required documents. Interested officers may also send an advance copy of the application by email to [email protected] or by post at the above address. The Bio-data Proforma (Annexure-II) is available on the NIA website at www.nia.gov.in/recruitment-notice.htm.
seo_tags: National Investigation Agency Crime Scene Assistant
